description: Registry of all skills in the Claude Code Skills Marketplace

categories.base: Always-on context skills that install into CLAUDE.md — active for every Claude Code session
categories.standards: Quality gates, checklists, and coding standards

skills.name: example-skill
skills.description: A sample skill that greets the user and summarizes the current project

skills.name: golden-rules
skills.description: Installs mandatory security, coding, naming, design, testing, error handling, API contract, and performance standards into CLAUDE.md as always-on context for every Claude Code session.

skills.name: agent-based-development
skills.description: Full async multi-agent development workflow: Planning → Design → Dev → Security/Tech Review loop with file-based handoffs and release-branch Git model.

skills.name: mvp-readiness
skills.description: Runs a structured MVP quality-gate audit covering stability, security, logging, docs, and implementation integrity. Reports pass/fail with evidence.

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: Structured security audit covering injection, auth, secrets, input validation, dependencies, and cryptography. Produces severity-graded findings.

skills.name: git-workflow
skills.description: Enforces the release-branch Git model: scaffold feature branches, open PRs with review checks, cut releases with tags, and view workflow reference.

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Structured engineering code review covering readability, complexity, test gaps, SOLID principles, and API consistency. Complements security-review with general code quality.

skills.name: test-writer
skills.description: Generates comprehensive unit and integration tests for a given file or function, auto-detecting the project test framework and matching existing test style.

skills.name: dependency-audit
skills.description: Audits project dependencies across package.json, requirements.txt, go.mod, and Gemfile for unpinned versions, deprecated packages, missing lockfiles, and known CVEs.

skills.name: changelog-generator
skills.description: Generates a structured CHANGELOG.md following Keep a Changelog format from git history and ABD handoff artifacts. Prepends new version sections to existing changelogs.

skills.name: onboarding
skills.description: Generates a comprehensive developer onboarding guide (ONBOARDING.md) by reading the codebase: directory map, entry points, environment variables, key commands, and architecture overview.

skills.name: requirements-generator
skills.description: Generates structured requirements documents with functional and non-functional requirements, Gherkin acceptance criteria, edge cases, and out-of-scope items.

skills.name: log-correlation
skills.description: Correlates and troubleshoots logs across OS (Linux/macOS), AWS (CloudWatch, CloudTrail, ALB, Lambda), application (JSON, logfmt), and web servers (Nginx, Apache).

skills.name: incident-report
skills.description: Generates professional incident reports using customizable templates. Supports outage, security, performance, and data-loss incident types. Extensible via templates/ and rules/.

skills.name: pre-commit
skills.description: Fast pre-commit quality gate: scans staged files for secrets, dead code, naming issues, merge conflict markers, and direct-to-main commits. Installs as a git hook via /pre-commit install.

skills.name: best-practices
skills.description: Holistic codebase audit that auto-detects the stack and produces a prioritized improvement roadmap with level-of-effort estimates.

skills.name: architecture-design
skills.description: Designs new systems from requirements: C4 model diagrams, service boundaries, API contracts, data design, failure modes, and cross-cutting concerns.

skills.name: architecture-review
skills.description: Audits existing architecture for anti-patterns, scalability and reliability risks, and testability gaps. Graded findings with migration paths and a to-be diagram.

skills.name: adr
skills.description: Creates and maintains Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) in docs/decisions/ using the MADR format. Supports creating, listing, updating, superseding, and searching ADRs.

skills.name: api-design
skills.description: Designs REST, GraphQL, and gRPC APIs (OpenAPI/schema/proto output) and reviews existing APIs for consistency, best practices, and breaking change risks.

skills.name: database-design
skills.description: Designs database schemas from domain requirements (ERD, indexes, migrations, security) or reviews existing schemas for normalization issues, missing indexes, unsafe migrations, and scalability risks.

skills.name: accessibility
skills.description: Audits code for WCAG 2.2 AA compliance and provides design guidance for accessible components. Covers semantic HTML, ARIA, keyboard nav, contrast, focus management, and motion.

skills.name: doc-refresh
skills.description: Complete documentation refresh — audits stale docs, creates missing docs, rewrites for a 2am on-call engineer with zero assumed context. Security callouts mandatory.
